name: Doctor Detective
original_name: สืบลับหมอระบาด
overview: When a deadly infectious disease resembling the Ebola virus ravages a small village, a team of epidemiologists led by Doctor Khunkhao races against time to investigate the source of the outbreak and contain the spread.

trailers.title: "สืบลับหมอระบาด" เร็ว ๆ นี้ | Ch3Thailand
